name: Vaccinia_terminal_short_tandem_repeats
description: Vaccinia ITR-internal short tandem repeats: two arrays of short tandem repeats embedded in the ITRs - the proximal ~70 bp 'TR70' block (typically ~13 copies in WR) and the distal ~125 bp 'TR125' block (~17 copies). Copy numbers vary across vaccinia strains and even between virion preparations of the same strain (slippage during replication), which is a known driver of vaccinia genome-size polymorphism. Highly repetitive tracts; short reads are essentially uninformative without long-read or assembly-based copy-number determination.
expected_copy_count: ~13 TR70 copies + ~17 TR125 copies per ITR in WR; variable across strains
